privileged_info_summary: The oral_history_validator@1 task uses synthetic data with 10 interview records created from a CSV file. The data intentionally has mixed date formats (MM/DD/YYYY, YYYY-MM-DD, and text like 'January 2023'), birth years ranging 1927-1945, and mixed completion states. Agents must standardize dates to YYYY-MM-DD format, calculate ages using the YEAR formula, and create an AND-logic validation formula checking: Transcription Status='Complete' AND Release Form Signed='Yes' AND Topic Tags not empty AND Interview Date not empty. The task requires conditional formatting and multi-level sorting (incomplete first, then by oldest date). Verification uses 6 criteria with a 70% pass threshold (4 of 6 must pass). The dataset produces 5 archive-ready records and 5 incomplete records based on the validation logic.
